case_title: THOMAS, GLADYS G. VS THE SAN FRANCISCO OLD CLAM HOUSE CORP. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY THOMAS, GLADYS G. AS TO DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO OLD CLAM HOUSE CORP. CHUA, LINGAN G DBA THE S. F. OLD CLAM HOUSE CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
